StmtSimple.StatementText:
SELECT u.name AS [Name], u.principal_id AS [ID], ISNULL(ak.name,N'') AS [AsymmetricKey], ISNULL(cert.name,N'') AS [Certificate], ISNULL(suser_sname(u.sid),N'') AS [Login],
CASE WHEN N'C' = u.type THEN 1 WHEN N'K' = u.type THEN 2 WHEN N'S' = u.type AND SUSER_SNAME(u.sid) is null AND u.authentication_type != 2 THEN 3 ELSE 0 END AS [UserType] FROM sys.database_principals AS u LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.asymmetric_keys AS ak ON ak.sid = u.sid LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.certificates AS cert ON cert.sid = u.sid WHERE (u.type in ('U', 'S', 'G', 'C', 'K' ,'E', 'X')) ORDER BY [Name] ASC

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN N'C'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN N'K'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) THEN (2) ELSE CASE WHEN N'S'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) AND suser_sname([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[sid]) IS NULL AND CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='S' AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[id]=(2) THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='S' AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[password] IS NULL AND CONVERT(binary(9),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[sid],0)<>0x010500000000000903 THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='S' AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[password] IS NOT NULL THEN (2) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='U' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='G' THEN (3) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='E' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='X' THEN (4) ELSE (0) END END END END END<>(2) THEN (3) ELSE (0) END END END

CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='S' AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[id]=(2) THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='S' AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[password] IS NULL AND CONVERT(binary(9),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[sid],0)<>0x010500000000000903 THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='S' AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[password] IS NOT NULL THEN (2) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='U' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='G' THEN (3) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='E' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='X' THEN (4) ELSE (0) END END END END END

has_access('US',[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[id])=(1) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='C' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='E' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='G' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='K' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='S' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='U' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='X')
